episodes.title: Sneaking Into The Mormon Cult (They HATE Him Now)
episodes.description:
Ex-Muslim, Ismail Youssef reveals his playbook on how he snuck into the Mormon religion, the exact moment he pulled out of his plan and how to expose their following as false.

Full Interview: https://youtu.be/G99J7ATUsyY
subjects: The Church Of Jesus Christ Of Latter-Day Saints
